22
22 - Lorenzo Sedita
Height: 6-7
Weight: 195
Hometown: Rome, Italy
Position: F
Year: Fr.
High School: Claremont Secondary School
Major: Undeclared
gp 4
pts/g 2.5
fg % 57.1
3pt % 0.0
ft % 100.0
reb/g 2.0
a/g 0.5
  • Bio
  • Player Profile
  • Game Log
  • Career Stats
  • Split Stats
  • News

High School: Attended Claremont Secondary School in Victoria, British Columbia, Canada... Coached by Brandon Dunlop, Aaron Buckham... Team MVP... Pitt Medows Tournament Champion... Stats: 23.4 ppg, 14.6 rpg, 6.1 apg.

Club Team: Flight Prep... Coached by Tyson Stapley... Club Stats: 20.0 ppg, 12.0 rpg, 6.0 apg.

Personal: Born May 11, 2007 in Rome, Italy... Son of Maurizio and Rita Sedita... Sister: Gaia (20)... Athletic Director's Honor Roll... Future plans: Pro Basketball player or business owner... Hobbies: Music and video games... Favorite movie: "The Wolf of Wall Street"... Favorite musical artist: Kendrick Lamar... Favorite sports team: Milwaukee Bucks... Favorite athlete: Giannis Antetokumnpo... Favorite food: Pasta... Most famous person Lorenzo has ever met: Cristiano Ronaldo.

Recent Games
Feb 11 Mars Hill W, 88-74
Feb 14 Newberry W, 89-73
Feb 18 UVA Wise L, 83-81
Feb 21 at Lenoir-Rhyne L, 90-77
Feb 25 at Emory & Henry L, 79-72
Feb 28 #8 Anderson L, 80-71

© 2023 TUSCULUM UNIVERSITY

60 SHILOH ROAD

GREENEVILLE, TN 37745

MISSION STATEMENT

"TUSCULUM WILL PREPARE STUDENT-ATHLETES TO BECOME PRINCIPLED LEADERS WHO ARE CONTRIBUTING CITIZENS AND CHAMPIONS IN LIFE BY INSTILLING THE HIGHEST VALUES OF CHARACTER, INTEGRITY, AND SPORTSMANSHIP."

Privacy Policy

We use cookies to ensure you have the best browsing experience on our website. By using our site, you acknowledge that you have read and understood our Privacy Policy & Terms of Service.
